data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the quiz/assessment option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the quiz/assessment option to confirm that users have read the policy documents. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a quiz/assessment option, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this feature is implemented or operational, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of the quiz/assessment option functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the quiz/assessment option requirement.
